name: chittyagent-gam
description: ChittyAgent-GAM — multi-account Google Workspace connector. Backs the ChittyMCP `gam_execute` capability and serves the two Workspace inboxes (nick@nevershitty.com, nick@jeanarlene.com) metadata-only per F-L10 for daily-comms-triage. Local executor (GAMADV-XTD3) on the VM, exposed via the ch1tty tunnel (gam.chitty.cc -> 127.0.0.1:9098). Consumer @gmail.com inboxes are out of scope (GAM cannot reach them; they use readonly Gmail MCP/REST).

metadata.privilege_policy: F-L10 metadata-only: From/Subject/Date headers only; no body or snippet crosses the domain boundary for Workspace accounts
